stemHtml: The speeds VNE and VMO refer to, respectively:

options.a: They can both refer to piston and jet aircraft.
options.b: V<sub>NE</sub> refers to pistons and V<sub>MO </sub>refers to jets.
options.c: V<sub>NE</sub> refers to jets and V<sub>MO</sub> refers to pistons.
options.d: They both apply to piston jet aircraft only.
